mapper.sql: id, user_id, sales_user_id, room_id, appointment_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, status, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user

a.id, a.user_id, COALESCE(c.real_name, c.username) AS customer_name, a.sales_user_id, COALESCE(s.real_name, s.username) AS sales_name, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.unit_id, bu.name AS unit_name, a.room_id, r.room_no, a.appointment_time, a.contact_name, a.contact_phone, a.remark, a.status, a.cancel_reason, a.create_time

INNER JOIN room r ON a.room_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN building_unit bu ON r.unit_id = bu.id AND bu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `user` c ON a.user_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `user` s ON a.sales_user_id = s.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment ( user_id, sales_user_id, room_id, appointment_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, status, create_user, update_user ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{salesUserId}, #{roomId}, #{appointmentTime}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment SET status = 2, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM appointment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM appointment a
WHERE a.user_id = #{userId}
AND a.status = 1 AND a.appointment_time >= NOW()
AND (a.status = 3 OR (a.status = 1 AND a.appointment_time < NOW()))
AND a.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY a.appointment_time DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT
FROM appointment a
WHERE a.sales_user_id = #{salesUserId}
AND a.status = 1 AND a.appointment_time >= NOW()
AND (a.status = 3 OR (a.status = 1 AND a.appointment_time < NOW()))
AND a.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY a.appointment_time DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT
FROM appointment a
WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.building_id = #{buildingId}
AND r.building_id = #{estateId}
AND b.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{buildingName}, '%')
AND a.sales_user_id = #{salesUserId}
AND COALESCE(s.real_name, s.username) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{salesName}, '%')
AND a.contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactName}, '%')
AND a.contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
AND a.status = 1 AND a.appointment_time >= NOW()
AND (a.status = 3 OR (a.status = 1 AND a.appointment_time < NOW()))
AND a.status = #{status}
ORDER BY a.appointment_time DESC, a.id DESC
